content.explanation:
**Will / Shall — Expressing Future:**

**WILL (सबसे common future modal):**

1. **Predictions / Beliefs:**
🇮🇳 कल बारिश होगी।
🇬🇧 It **will** rain tomorrow.

2. **Promises:**
🇮🇳 मैं ज़रूर वापस आऊँगा।
🇬🇧 I **will** definitely come back.

3. **Spontaneous Decisions (on the spot):**
🇮🇳 मैं phone उठाता हूँ।
🇬🇧 I'**ll** get the phone. (just decided NOW)

4. **Offers/Willingness:**
🇮🇳 मैं तुम्हारी help करूँगा।
🇬🇧 I **will** help you.

**SHALL (formal / British / offers + suggestions):**
- Shall I open the window? (Can I / Should I?)
- Shall we begin? (Let's begin?)
- We shall overcome. (formal promise)

**Structure:** Subject + will/shall + Base Verb (V1)
**Negative:** Subject + **won't / shan't** + V1
**Question:** **Will** + subject + V1?
rules: Will + V1 = future (predictions, promises, offers, spontaneous decisions)
Shall + V1 = formal future, offers (shall I/we?), British English
Contraction: I will → I'll, he will → he'll, she will → she'll
Won't = will not (negative); shan't = shall not (very formal)
Question: Will you...? / Shall I...? / Shall we...?
Going to = planned future; Will = unplanned/prediction at time of speaking
content.memoryTrick: **Will = Your Promise Ring 💍** — जब आप 'will' use करते हो, आप future का एक promise/commitment दे रहे हो। 'I will be there' = मेरा वादा है। Shall = पूछना है — Shall I? = क्या मैं?

examples.english: I will go to the office tomorrow.

examples.hindi: मैं यह secret किसी को नहीं बताऊँगा।
examples.english: I will not tell this secret to anyone.

examples.hindi: वह interview में ज़रूर अच्छा करेगा।
examples.english: He will definitely do well in the interview.

mistakes.why: "Will" never changes form — no -s with he/she/it

mistakes.correct: I will be able to do it.
mistakes.why: Two modals not together — use "be able to"

speakingTips: Spontaneous office help: 'I'll send you that file right now.'
Making commitments: 'I will complete this by Friday, I promise.'
Polite offers: 'Shall I make tea for everyone in the meeting?'

vocabulary.example: I predict it will be sunny.
We will deliver it on time.

practice.hindi: मैं कल office जाऊँगा।
practice.english: I will go to the office tomorrow.
alternatives: i will visit the office tomorrow.

practice.hindi: क्या आप मेरी मदद करेंगे?
practice.english: Will you help me?
alternatives: will you assist me?

practice.hindi: वह अगले साल विदेश जाएगी।
practice.english: She will go abroad next year.
alternatives: she will travel overseas next year.

practice.hindi: मैं यह secret किसी को नहीं बताऊँगा।
practice.english: I will not tell this secret to anyone.
alternatives: i won't tell this secret.

practice.hindi: क्या हम शुरू करें?
practice.english: Shall we begin?
alternatives: shall we start?

practice.hindi: वह interview में अच्छा करेगा।
practice.english: He will do well in the interview.
alternatives: he will perform well in the interview.

practice.hindi: क्या मैं door खोलूँ?
practice.english: Shall I open the door?
alternatives: should i open the door?

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हें शाम तक email करूँगा।
practice.english: I will email you by evening.
alternatives: i will send you an email by evening.

practice.hindi: वे project Friday तक complete करेंगे।
practice.english: They will complete the project by Friday.
alternatives: they will finish the project before friday.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मुझे station drop करोगे?
practice.english: Will you drop me at the station?
alternatives: will you take me to the station?

practice.hindi: यह नई policy next month से लागू होगी।
practice.english: This new policy will come into effect from next month.
alternatives: the new policy will be effective from next month.

practice.hindi: मैं phone उठाता हूँ — रुको।
practice.english: I'll get the phone — wait.
alternatives: i'll answer the phone — hold on.

practice.hindi: क्या हम lunch के बाद meeting करें?
practice.english: Shall we have the meeting after lunch?
alternatives: shall we meet after lunch?

practice.hindi: वह कभी नहीं बदलेगा।
practice.english: He will never change.
alternatives: he is never going to change.

practice.hindi: मैं इसका reply कल सुबह करूँगा।
practice.english: I will reply to this tomorrow morning.
alternatives: i will respond tomorrow morning.

practice.hindi: क्या वह offer accept करेगा?
practice.english: Will he accept the offer?
alternatives: will he agree to the offer?

practice.hindi: हम ज़रूर results deliver करेंगे।
practice.english: We will definitely deliver results.
alternatives: we will surely produce results.

practice.hindi: क्या मैं यह report आपको send करूँ?
practice.english: Shall I send you this report?
alternatives: should i forward you this report?

practice.hindi: भविष्य में AI सब कुछ change कर देगा।
practice.english: AI will change everything in the future.
alternatives: artificial intelligence will transform everything.

practice.hindi: मैं इसकी पूरी ज़िम्मेदारी लूँगा।
practice.english: I will take full responsibility for this.
alternatives: i will be fully accountable for this.

practice.hindi: वह Tuesday तक वापस आ जाएगी।
practice.english: She will be back by Tuesday.
alternatives: she will return by tuesday.

practice.hindi: क्या तुम मेरे साथ दिल्ली चलोगे?
practice.english: Will you come with me to Delhi?
alternatives: will you join me on the trip to delhi?

practice.hindi: मैं deadline miss नहीं करूँगा।
practice.english: I won't miss the deadline.
alternatives: i will not miss the deadline.

practice.hindi: क्या हम इस deal पर आगे बढ़ें?
practice.english: Shall we proceed with this deal?
alternatives: shall we go ahead with the deal?

practice.hindi: यह medicine तुम्हें ठीक कर देगी।
practice.english: This medicine will cure you.
alternatives: this medicine will make you better.

practice.hindi: मैं तुम्हारे साथ हमेशा रहूँगा।
practice.english: I will always be with you.
alternatives: i will be by your side forever.

practice.hindi: वह team को better lead करेगा।
practice.english: He will lead the team better.
alternatives: he will be a better team leader.

practice.hindi: क्या मैं आपके लिए कुछ कर सकता हूँ?
practice.english: Shall I do something for you?
alternatives: can i help you with anything?

practice.hindi: चिंता मत करो — सब ठीक हो जाएगा।
practice.english: Don't worry — everything will be alright.
alternatives: everything is going to be fine.

practice.hindi: Company इस साल नए employees hire करेगी।
practice.english: The company will hire new employees this year.
alternatives: the firm will recruit new staff this year.
